job.title: Software Engineering Intern (Summer 2026, Americas)
job.description:
About the role

Join Shopify as a Software Engineering Intern for Summer 2026. You will build production Ruby on Rails features, pair with mentors, and ship code that merchants rely on every day.

Qualifications:

  • Currently pursuing a BS or MS in Computer Science or a related field
  • Strong programming fundamentals and curiosity about commerce systems
